request.description:
Publish a master catalog with canonical resource definitions.

publishDirectives specifies catalogType: "MASTER" and updateMode: "FULL" (replaces all resources for this catalog).

Master resources define the canonical shape; regular catalogs can extend them via resourceDirectives.extends.

Search master resources by networkIds and schemaTypes.

filters.networkIds: empty list = match all networks.
filters.schemaTypes: empty list = match all types.
pagination: limit clamped to [1, 100], default 20.

Search regular resources by networkIds.

filters.type: REGULAR returns only provider catalogs.
pagination: limit clamped to [1, 100], default 20.

Search master resources filtered by schema type.

schemaTypes narrows results to resources matching the GroceryResource schema.
pagination: limit clamped to [1, 100], default 20.

variable.description: Beckn Catalg service host (catalog publish, subscription)
UUID returned by Create Subscription — paste here before running Pull requests
Beckn Cataloging Service host for subscription endpoint
Beckn Cataloging Service host for pull and search endpoints
